Home.Title: Louie Jones-Strong
Home.QuickDescription: I am a practical full-stack developer and creative technologist with a First Class Honours in Machine Learning & AI; experienced building games, interactive web apps, and multimedia tools using Unity, C#, C++, Python, GO, JavaScript and Blender.
Home.FullDescription: I am a practical full-stack developer and creative technologist with a First Class Honours in Machine Learning & AI; experienced building games, interactive web apps, and multimedia tools using Unity, C#, C++, Python, GO, JavaScript and Blender.

personal.Title: Personal
personal.QuickDescription: Personal page to show off all of the projects I have worked on.
personal.FullDescription: Personal portfolio aggregating project highlights, technical skills and links used to present professional work and maintain an up-to-date CV of software and creative projects.

Education.Title: Education
Education.FullDescription: Summary of formal education, modules and achievements demonstrating a First Class Honours degree in Machine Learning and AI alongside relevant technical coursework and practical projects.

GCSEs.Title: GCSEs
GCSEs.QuickDescription: GCSEs studied at Blatchington Mill School.
GCSEs.FullDescription: Record of GCSE subjects and outcomes demonstrating a broad academic foundation across STEM and humanities, supporting later specialised study in computing and mathematics.

LawGCSE.Title: Law
LawGCSE.QuickDescription: Covered foundational legal principles, providing an understanding of the British legal system and highlighting its distinctions from the American legal systems. Explored key legislation and case law, encompassing both criminal and civil law. Examined the court system, human rights, and the role of legal professionals. Developed analytical and evaluative skills through the exploration of real-life legal scenarios.
LawGCSE.FullDescription: Studied foundational legal concepts and case analysis, developing critical thinking and structured argumentation applicable to regulated and compliance-sensitive projects.

MathsGCSE.Title: Maths
MathsGCSE.QuickDescription: Covered: algebra, geometry, measures, trigonometry, statistics, and probability.
MathsGCSE.FullDescription: Demonstrated proficiency in algebra, geometry and statistics, providing core analytical and quantitative skills used throughout programming and data science work.

ICT-GCSE.Title: ICT
ICT-GCSE.QuickDescription: Focused on Microsoft Office tools, HTML and python, and understanding computer systems, graphic design, and communication tools.
ICT-GCSE.FullDescription: Practical experience with Office tools, basic HTML and Python, and an introduction to computer systems and digital communication, forming a technical foundation for software projects.

AdditionalScienceGCSE.Title: Additional Science
AdditionalScienceGCSE.QuickDescription: Covered essential principles of biology, chemistry, and physics. Topics included ecosystems, chemical reactions, and forces. This course provided a foundational understanding of scientific concepts, laying the groundwork for more advanced studies in each discipline.
AdditionalScienceGCSE.FullDescription: Covered interdisciplinary scientific principles in biology, chemistry and physics, developing experimental reasoning and data interpretation skills.

FurtherAdditionalScienceGCSE.Title: Further Additional Science
FurtherAdditionalScienceGCSE.QuickDescription: Covered concepts in biology, chemistry, and physics. Exploring topics such as: genetics, organic chemistry, and quantum physics.
FurtherAdditionalScienceGCSE.FullDescription: Extended study in scientific topics including genetics and chemistry, strengthening analytical problem solving and laboratory-style investigation skills.

EnglishGCSE.Title: English
EnglishGCSE.QuickDescription: Covered: reading, writing, speaking and listening. Studied a range of texts from different time periods and genres. Developed creative writing skills through the creation of original pieces of writing.
EnglishGCSE.FullDescription: Developed written and verbal communication skills through analysis of varied texts and creation of original written work, supporting clear technical documentation and presentations.

ComputingGCSE.Title: Computing
ComputingGCSE.QuickDescription: Covered: programming, algorithms, data representation, computer systems, computer communication and networking, databases, and the consequences of uses of computing.
ComputingGCSE.FullDescription: Introduced to programming, algorithms, data representation and computer systems, establishing practical coding skills and theoretical understanding of computing fundamentals.

PerformingArtsProductionGCSE.Title: Performing Arts Production
PerformingArtsProductionGCSE.QuickDescription: Covered the fundamentals of performing arts production, including: lighting, sound, set design, rigging, health and safety, and stage management. As part of the course I worked on a number of productions.
PerformingArtsProductionGCSE.FullDescription: Gained hands-on experience in lighting, sound, set design and stage management, developing project coordination and technical production skills.

ALevels.Title: A Levels
ALevels.FullDescription: Advanced study across maths, physics and computer science preparing for higher education in machine learning and software engineering, with practical project experience.

GlobalSocialLeaders.Title: Global Social Leaders
GlobalSocialLeaders.QuickDescription: Three others and I led a team of 15 engineers, repurposing aluminum cans into wind turbines, sprinkler systems, and birdhouses to enhance the local community. We were awarded with 2nd place in the global competition with 100+ teams.
GlobalSocialLeaders.FullDescription: Led a team to design and deliver community-focused engineering projects, coordinating resources and securing 2nd place in an international competition of 100+ teams.

PhysicsALevel.Title: Physics
PhysicsALevel.QuickDescription: In A level physics I learned: mechanics, materials, waves, electricity, magnetism, and quantum physics. Using a range of experimental methods to collect data and to test hypotheses. I applied vectors, calculus, and trigonometry to describe and analyse the behaviour of real systems.
PhysicsALevel.FullDescription: A-level physics focused on mechanics, electricity and experimental methods, building quantitative modelling skills and experience with data-driven hypothesis testing.

MathsALevel.Title: Maths
MathsALevel.QuickDescription: In A level maths I learned: calculus, algebra, and geometry. Differential and integral calculus for function analysis. Applied algebra to solve complex equations and manipulate matrices. Advanced geometry and trigonometry for spatial reasoning. Covered statistical methods, probability, and mathematical modelling. Developed strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
MathsALevel.FullDescription: Advanced mathematics covering calculus, algebra and statistics, used to inform algorithm design, numerical methods and data analysis tasks in later projects.

ComputerScienceALevel.Title: Computer Science
ComputerScienceALevel.QuickDescription: Covered the fundamentals of computer science, including: programming, algorithms, data structures, data representation, computer systems, computer organisation and architecture, communication and networking, databases, discrete maths, and the consequences of uses of computing.
ComputerScienceALevel.FullDescription: Comprehensive study of programming, algorithms and computer architecture, providing a strong theoretical and practical foundation for software development and systems design.

HeadBoyALevel.Title: Head Boy
HeadBoyALevel.QuickDescription: As Head Boy of a STEM college, I actively collaborated with local companies, chambers of commerce and the local community bridging the gap between academia and industry. I showcased our institution's achievements, programs, and the talents of our students. Representing the college, I played a pivotal role in fostering positive relationships between the institution and external stakeholders.
HeadBoyALevel.FullDescription: Represented the college in community and industry engagement activities, developing leadership, stakeholder communication and public-facing presentation experience.

EPQProject.Title: EPQ
EPQProject.QuickDescription: My college EPQ dissertation on multi-technique supervised machine learning.
EPQProject.FullDescription: Independent research dissertation investigating multi-technique supervised machine learning, implementing experiments in Python and TensorFlow and producing a formal written report.

Degree.Title: Degree
Degree.QuickDescription: Bachelor of Science in Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence.
Degree.FullDescription: Bachelor of Science in Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence (First Class), combining theoretical coursework with applied projects in ML, data science and software engineering.

IntroToProgramming1.Title: Introduction To Programming I
IntroToProgramming1.QuickDescription: This module covered core programming techniques, including variables, conditionals, functions, and loops. It emphasized interactive, graphical program creation and introduced basic object-oriented programming.
IntroToProgramming1.FullDescription: Introductory programming module developing interactive graphical applications and basic object-oriented techniques using JavaScript, awarded First Class.

DiscreteMaths.Title: Discrete Mathematics
DiscreteMaths.QuickDescription: Covered sets, logic (propositional and predicate), functions, relations, graphs, trees, induction and recursion. This module builds a foundation to describe problems and algorithms in a mathematical way.
DiscreteMaths.FullDescription: Discrete mathematics covering sets, logic and graph theory, enabling formal problem descriptions and correctness reasoning for algorithms and software.

FundamentalsOfComputerScience.Title: Fundamentals Of Computer Science
FundamentalsOfComputerScience.QuickDescription: This module covered binary representations and logic, complexity theory and theories of computation, finite state machines and Turing machines. These are then applied to databases, artificial intelligence and machine learning.
FundamentalsOfComputerScience.FullDescription: Core computing theory covering computation models, complexity and automata, informing efficient algorithm design and system-level thinking.

HowComputersWork.Title: How Computers Work
HowComputersWork.QuickDescription: This module covered computer systems, computer architecture, operating systems, networks, databases and data representation.
HowComputersWork.FullDescription: Module on computer architecture, operating systems and networking, offering practical understanding of low-level system behaviour relevant to performance and scalability.

IntroToProgramming2.Title: Introduction To Programming II
IntroToProgramming2.QuickDescription: Focused on maintainable code, defensive coding techniques, program testing techniques, cyclical approaches to software development, encapsulation, developing code across multiple files and using third-party libraries.
IntroToProgramming2.FullDescription: Follow-up programming module emphasising maintainable code, testing and modular design across multi-file projects using JavaScript, HTML and CSS.

ComputationalMaths.Title: Computational Mathematics
ComputationalMaths.QuickDescription: This module covered computer systems, computer architecture, operating systems, networks, databases and data representation.
ComputationalMaths.FullDescription: Applied numerical methods and computational techniques supporting simulation, optimisation and analysis tasks used in later machine learning and graphics projects.

AlgorithmsAndDataStructures1.Title: Algorithms And Data Structures I
AlgorithmsAndDataStructures1.QuickDescription: This module covered linear data structures such as arrays, vectors and lists. Expressing algorithms as flowcharts and pseudocode. Sorting and searching algorithms.
AlgorithmsAndDataStructures1.FullDescription: Covered core linear data structures and fundamental algorithms, providing the building blocks for efficient software implementations.

WebDevelopment.Title: Web Development
WebDevelopment.QuickDescription: This module introduced me to HTML, CSS and JavaScript. It covered the document object model and how you can dynamically manipulate it with JavaScript to create interactive web pages. It also covered accessibility and usability issues.
WebDevelopment.FullDescription: Practical web development experience building accessible interactive frontends using HTML, CSS and JavaScript, and collaborating on multi-person projects with version control.

ObjectOrientedProgramming.Title: Object Oriented Programming
ObjectOrientedProgramming.QuickDescription: This module covered objects and classes, inheritance, abstraction and polymorphism. It also covered code documentation and style.
ObjectOrientedProgramming.FullDescription: Studied object-oriented design, encapsulation and polymorphism with hands-on C++ exercises and attention to code documentation and style.

SoftwareDesignAndDevelopment.Title: Software Design And Development
SoftwareDesignAndDevelopment.QuickDescription: This module covered defensive coding, exception handling, unit testing, test driven development and collaboration using version control.
SoftwareDesignAndDevelopment.FullDescription: Focused on defensive coding, exception handling, unit testing and TDD, with collaborative development practices using Git for reproducible, reliable software.

AgileSoftwareProjects.Title: Agile Software Projects
AgileSoftwareProjects.QuickDescription: This module covered project management, requirements gathering, user centred design, agile software development methodologies, test driven software development, software validation and user testing. It also covered professional practices and software documentation.
AgileSoftwareProjects.FullDescription: Team-based projects applying agile methodologies, requirements gathering and user-centred design to deliver iterative web applications and validated user testing.

DatabasesNetworksAndTheWeb.Title: Databases, Networks And The Web
DatabasesNetworksAndTheWeb.QuickDescription: This module covered networking concepts, socket architectures, HTTP servers, relational databases, querying a database, representing data in a database.
DatabasesNetworksAndTheWeb.FullDescription: Explored networking, HTTP server design and relational databases, implementing backend and data models to support web applications and APIs.

ProgrammingWithData.Title: Programming With Data
ProgrammingWithData.QuickDescription: This module covered data-driven programming, visualising data, descriptive statistics, getting data, processing data, classification and clustering.
ProgrammingWithData.FullDescription: Data-focused programming module covering data acquisition, processing, visualization and introductory machine learning workflows using Python and SQL.

ComputerSecurity.Title: Computer Security
ComputerSecurity.QuickDescription: This module covered security threats, access control and authentication, security models, operating system security, network security, cryptography, cryptographic protocols and key management, public key cryptography and blockchain protocols.
ComputerSecurity.FullDescription: Studied security models, cryptography and network security, gaining a practical understanding of authentication, key management and threat mitigation.

GraphicsProgramming.Title: Graphics Programming
GraphicsProgramming.QuickDescription: This module covered coordinate transformations, number generators, images, pixels, colors, image processing, computer vision, simulating physical systems and 3D graphics.
GraphicsProgramming.FullDescription: Graphics and image processing module covering 2D/3D transforms, image manipulation and simulation techniques applied in creative software projects.

AlgorithmsAndDataStructures2.Title: Algorithms And Data Structures II
AlgorithmsAndDataStructures2.QuickDescription: This module covered stacks, queues, binary trees, heaps, priority queues, implicit array algorithms, recursion, iteration, graphs, shortest-path algorithms, sets, maps, hash tables and collections.
AlgorithmsAndDataStructures2.FullDescription: Advanced data structures and graph algorithms with implementation experience in C++ and Python, used to build performant software systems.

DatabasesAndAdvancedDataTechniques.Title: Databases And Advanced Data Techniques
DatabasesAndAdvancedDataTechniques.QuickDescription: This module covered basic databases and data schemas for a website, CRUD/RESTful APIs, web sockets, user authentication and security, working with external APIs and scalability.
DatabasesAndAdvancedDataTechniques.FullDescription: Designed and implemented RESTful APIs, database schemas and authentication flows, focusing on scalable data-driven web services.

MachineLearningAndNeuralNetworks.Title: Machine Learning And Neural Networks
MachineLearningAndNeuralNetworks.QuickDescription: This module covered regression, classification, clustering, matrix completion, pattern recognition, neural networks, multi-layer perceptrons, back propagation, network optimisers, deep and recurrent networks.
MachineLearningAndNeuralNetworks.FullDescription: Comprehensive study of supervised and unsupervised learning, neural network architectures and training techniques, implemented in Python with TensorFlow and scikit-learn.

ArtificialIntelligence.Title: Artificial Intelligence
ArtificialIntelligence.QuickDescription: This module covered reinforcement learning, problem solving, knowledge representation and ontologies, reasoning under uncertainty,optimal decisions in games, robotics and automated scientific discovery.
ArtificialIntelligence.FullDescription: Explored reinforcement learning, knowledge representation and probabilistic reasoning, applying AI techniques to decision-making and automated problem solving.

IntelligentSignalProcessing.Title: Intelligent Signal Processing
IntelligentSignalProcessing.QuickDescription: This module covered capturing, representing and processing audio and camera inputs as well as video. It covered LTI systems and impulse responses, frequency domain representations, extracting features from signals, speech recognition, computer vision, compressing signals.
IntelligentSignalProcessing.FullDescription: Worked on signal and image processing techniques for audio and video, including feature extraction and compression methods used in applied ML pipelines.

NaturalLanguageProcessing.Title: Natural Language Processing
NaturalLanguageProcessing.QuickDescription: This module covered information retrieval and curation in NLP, formal grammars, rule based NLP, statistical NLP, NER, stemmers, taggers and parsers, software packages for NLP and applications of NLP.
NaturalLanguageProcessing.FullDescription: Studied rule-based and statistical NLP methods including tokenisation, NER and parsing, and applied tools for information retrieval and text processing.

DataScience.Title: Data Science
DataScience.QuickDescription: This module covered working with different types of data, correlation and regression, distributions and significance, processing text data, decision making based on data analysis, data visualisation, time-series data visualisation, scientific data visualisation and case studies.
DataScience.FullDescription: Practical data science module covering exploratory analysis, visualization and statistical decision making to derive actionable insights from datasets.

FinalProject.Title: Dissertation
FinalProject.QuickDescription: My dissertation involved independently planning, managing, researching, designing, developing, testing and evaluating my own software project. For this project I designed a new machine learning framework for creating agents for the games industry.
FinalProject.FullDescription: Dissertation project designing and implementing a machine learning framework for game agent creation, involving end-to-end research, implementation and evaluation.

odyssey.Title: TT Odyssey
odyssey.QuickDescription: My time at TT Odyssey working on: LEGO® Star Wars™ Battles & Game Of Thrones: Dragonfire.
odyssey.FullDescription: Professional experience at TT Odyssey contributing to multiple live titles across engineering roles, including gameplay systems, tooling and cross-platform integrations.

LSWB.Title: LEGO® Star Wars™ Battles
LSWB.QuickDescription: My time at TT Odyssey working on LEGO® Star Wars™ Battles.
LSWB.FullDescription: Worked on LEGO Star Wars Battles contributing to core gameplay features and engine-level scripting using Unity and C#, supporting a commercially released mobile title.

odyssey_GameJams.Title: Next Project Prototyping
odyssey_GameJams.QuickDescription: I helped prototype a number of projects at TT Odyssey.
odyssey_GameJams.FullDescription: Rapid prototyping of game concepts and mechanics in small teams, producing playable prototypes and validating ideas using Unity and iterative design.

odyssey_project1.Title: NDA Project 1
odyssey_project1.FullDescription: Contributed to a confidential, unannounced project delivering engineering tasks in Unity and cross-team collaboration under NDA.

got_df.Title: Game Of Thrones: Dragonfire
got_df.QuickDescription: Contracting for WB Games Boston on Game Of Thrones: Dragonfire.
got_df.FullDescription: Contract engineering for WB Games Boston on Game of Thrones Dragonfire, building microservices and gameplay features using Unity, C# and Golang for live operations.

got_conquest.Title: Game Of Thrones: Conquest
got_conquest.QuickDescription: Contracting for WB Games Boston on Game Of Thrones: Conquest.
got_conquest.FullDescription: Contract work on backend microservices and tooling for Game of Thrones Conquest, focusing on scalable services using Golang, Docker and SQL.

odyssey_product_scrapper.Title: Product Scraper
odyssey_product_scrapper.QuickDescription: Golang project to scrape product details from a manufacturer's website and exports the data to a CSV file.
odyssey_product_scrapper.FullDescription: Implemented a Golang-based web scraper to extract product data and export CSV reports, improving data collection efficiency for product research.

odyssey_GraphicsCourse.Title: Graphics Course
odyssey_GraphicsCourse.QuickDescription: Learned how to create a graphics and physics sandbox in OpenGL and C++.
odyssey_GraphicsCourse.FullDescription: Completed a graphics and physics sandbox project in C++ and OpenGL, implementing rendering and simulation techniques for performance and correctness.

EnglishTutor.Title: English Tutor
EnglishTutor.QuickDescription: I spent my evenings after TT Odyssey working as an English tutor for Arabic students, focusing on preparing them for the IELTS speaking exam.
EnglishTutor.FullDescription: Provided one-to-one English tuition for non-native speakers focused on IELTS speaking, improving client confidence and exam readiness through tailored lessons.

MathsTutor.Title: Maths Tutor
MathsTutor.QuickDescription: While at TT Odyssey and studying, I regularly made time at weekends to tutor GCSE maths. This was for a number of students that would have failed otherwise due to lack of class time because covid.
MathsTutor.FullDescription: Private tutoring in GCSE mathematics during the pandemic, delivering targeted lessons that supported students to achieve passing or improved grades.

BusinessConsulting.Title: Business Consulting
BusinessConsulting.QuickDescription: During my last year of university I worked as a consultant for a number of small businesses.
BusinessConsulting.FullDescription: Consulted for small businesses on web and data solutions, delivering bespoke Python and frontend implementations to improve workflows and online presence.

Talks.Title: Talks
Talks.QuickDescription: I was invited to give a talk on machine learning and artificial intelligence by U3A group. I used making a cake as an analogy for the process of creating a machine learning model.
Talks.FullDescription: Delivered public talks on machine learning and AI using accessible analogies, demonstrating ability to communicate complex technical concepts to general audiences.

BlenderProjects.Title: 24 Hour Blender Challenge
BlenderProjects.QuickDescription: I challenged myself to learn different Blender skills, giving myself only 24 hours for each one.
BlenderProjects.FullDescription: Series of time-boxed 24-hour Blender challenges showcasing rapid prototyping of 3D modelling and rendering skills, shared publicly to demonstrate creative and technical capability.

EggHuntProject.Title: Office Egg Hunt
EggHuntProject.QuickDescription: A 3D game for my colleagues to play in lockdown, set within my model of our office.
EggHuntProject.FullDescription: Designed and developed a 3D office-themed game during lockdown using Unity and Blender to create assets and gameplay, published to itch.io with source on GitHub.

CubePuzzleProject.Title: Alhambra 4D Cube Puzzle
CubePuzzleProject.QuickDescription: My algorithm to discover the solutions to the Alhambra Cube Puzzle.
CubePuzzleProject.FullDescription: Developed an algorithmic solver for the Alhambra 4D Cube Puzzle in Python, demonstrating combinatorial search techniques and optimization strategies.

Minesweeper.Title: Mine Sweeper
Minesweeper.QuickDescription: To prepare for my University courses I taught myself JS, HTML and CSS.
Minesweeper.FullDescription: Built a browser-based Minesweeper clone using HTML, CSS and JavaScript to learn frontend development fundamentals and publishable web games.

CalculatorSolver.Title: Calculator: The Game Solver
CalculatorSolver.FullDescription: Implemented a solver for the Calculator game in Python, applying search algorithms and heuristics to automate puzzle solving and validate approaches.

MediaStudio.Title: Media Studio
MediaStudio.QuickDescription: Web based painting tool with features such as: layers, alpha, webcam overlay and project templates.
MediaStudio.FullDescription: Created a web-based painting application with layer support, webcam overlay and templates using JavaScript, HTML and CSS to demonstrate rich-client UX capabilities.

HouseFinder.Title: House Finder
HouseFinder.QuickDescription: House Finder aggregates multiple data sources to filter and prioritise property listings based on spatial, financial, and subjective criteria, with a website and server providing an intuitive, interactive way to explore the process and final housing options.
HouseFinder.FullDescription: Architected and built an aggregator to prioritise property listings by spatial, financial and subjective criteria with an interactive website and server-side processing.

FoodFinder.Title: Food Finder
FoodFinder.QuickDescription: Golang-powered website to discover recipes, plan meals, manage ingredients, and maintain a healthy diet while reducing food costs.
FoodFinder.FullDescription: Developed a Golang-backed recipe discovery and meal-planning web application to manage ingredients, reduce food costs and support healthy eating.

MnistDraw.Title: Mnist Draw
MnistDraw.QuickDescription: I trained an MNIST model, balancing accuracy and latency, and integrated it into a web app for real-time interactive digit prediction.
MnistDraw.FullDescription: Trained and integrated an MNIST digit recognition model into a real-time web app, optimising for inference latency and user interactivity.

MonsterMash.Title: Monster Mash
MonsterMash.QuickDescription: Rogue-like made with the limitations of the Game boy. You upgrade you monster with the body parts of creatures you defeat.
MonsterMash.FullDescription: Co-developed a Game Boy-style roguelike in Unity, implementing upgrade systems and procedural encounters as part of a small team.

looking-for-eden.Title: Looking For Eden
looking-for-eden.QuickDescription: A post-civilization story game based in space. As you visit planets you find the story of those who lived long ago.
looking-for-eden.FullDescription: Collaborative narrative game developed in Unity combining exploration and storytelling, responsible for gameplay programming and asset integration.

RougeClicker.Title: Rogue Clicker
RougeClicker.QuickDescription: A short fast passed clicker with constant upgrades.
RougeClicker.FullDescription: Solo-developed an incremental clicker game in Unity with progression and upgrade mechanics, focusing on rapid iteration and player engagement loops.

DrPlantenstein.Title: Dr. Plantenstein
DrPlantenstein.QuickDescription: Shop and garden management game made for GB jam 10. You play as a herbalist who grows plants to heal the villagers.
DrPlantenstein.FullDescription: Designed and built a shop and garden management game for GB Jam 10, contributing gameplay systems, UI and cooperative design with a small team.

Cards.Title: Cards
Cards.QuickDescription: Collection of cards I have made for different occasions, in blender.
Cards.FullDescription: Collection of Blender-made greeting cards demonstrating 3D modelling and composition skills used for personal and commissioned work.

LandscapeCards.Title: Landscape Cards
LandscapeCards.QuickDescription: Cards I have made of landscapes, in blender.
LandscapeCards.FullDescription: Series of landscape greeting cards modelled and rendered in Blender, exhibiting composition, lighting and scene optimisation techniques.

XmasCards.Title: Christmas Cards
XmasCards.QuickDescription: Cards I have made for Christmas, in blender.
XmasCards.FullDescription: Seasonal Blender card designs demonstrating creative use of 3D tools and asset workflows for rapid production of themed artwork.
